node.name: Museum of Contemporary Art Toronto
node.description: Cutting-edge contemporary art space in a converted industrial building showcasing experimental works.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Itinerary > Day 2 > Art Gallery of Ontario

node.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node.description: World-class museum showcasing Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a stunning Frank Gehry-designed building.

node.name: Theatre Passe Muraille
node.description: Iconic experimental theatre presenting avant-garde Canadian productions in an intimate setting.
